svg:
<title id="title>A/B Testing Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">A/B testing failure modes: sample ratio mismatch, peeking, novelty effects, and exposure logging gaps
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
A/B Testing Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">Sample ratio mismatch, peeking, novelty effects, and exposure gaps
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. Sample Ratio Mismatch (SRM)
<text x="140 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="white>Expected <text" x="140" y="195 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#6ee7b7">Control: 5000 <text x="140 y="210" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#6ee7b7>Treatment: 5000
<text x="240 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Mismatch!
<rect" x="265" y="150 width="145" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="337" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="white">Actual <text x="337 y="195" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#fca5a5>Control: 5000 <text" x="337" y="210 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#fca5a5">Treatment: 3500
<text x="235 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Biased results! Treatment group different! <text" x="235" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Buggy assignment, differential drop-off <text x="235 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: SRM detection, halt experiment
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke-width="2/> 2. Peeking (Early Stopping)
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #fffbeb)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #fcd34d)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="100" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="540" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Day 1 <text x="540 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>p="0.03!</text">
<text x="610 y="165" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Stop early
<rect" x="635" y="150 width="100" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="685" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Day 7 <text x="685 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>p="0.15</text">
<text x="755 y="165" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>True result
<rect" x="780" y="150 width="60" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #3b82f6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #1e40af)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="810" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Wait <text x="810 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#bfdbfe>Full run
<text" x="665" y="240 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">False positive from early stopping! <text x="665 y="260" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Multiple hypothesis testing <text" x="665" y="280 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Sequential testing, fixed sample size
<text x="235 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #8b5cf6">3. Novelty Effect
<text x="110 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Week 1 <text" x="110" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">+15% lift!
<line x1="165 y1="423" x2="195 y2="423" stroke="var(--text-theme, #64748b)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)/>
<text" x="255" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Week 2 <text x="255 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fcd34d>+5% lift
<text x="380 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Week 3 <text" x="380" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#94a3b8">0%
<text x="235 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Initial lift fades as users adapt! <text" x="235" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: Users react to change, not improvement <text x="235 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Run experiments longer, ignore week 1
<rect" x="460" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #10b981)" stroke-width="2/> 4. Exposure Logging Gaps
<rect" x="480" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #ecfdf5)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6ee7b7)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="395 width="100" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #3b82f6)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #1e40af)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="540" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Assigned <text x="540 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#bfdbfe>10000 users
<text x="610 y="410" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Logging fails
<rect" x="635" y="395 width="100" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b45309)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="685" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Exposed <text x="685 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fcd34d>7000 users
<text x="755 y="410" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Missing data
<rect" x="780" y="395 width="60" height="50" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="810" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">! <text x="810 y="438" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>Biased
<text" x="665" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Analysis on wrong population! <text x="665 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Logging failures, client bugs <text" x="665" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Validate exposure logs, SRM checks
<marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)"/>
<marker id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)"/>
